title: CMS-driven Blog with Payload CMS
description: Build a full-featured content blog from zero to production: Next.js App Router, Payload CMS for content management, email newsletter with Resend, error monitoring, and Vercel deployment.

steps.description: Scaffold the Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up Tailwind CSS v4 for styling
Install shadcn/ui for accessible UI components
Set up Payload CMS as the headless content backend (posts, authors, categories, media)
Set up Resend for newsletter subscription emails
Create branded newsletter and notification email templates
Add error monitoring and performance tracking
Set up unit tests for utilities and content helpers
Add E2E tests for reading posts and newsletter sign-up
Configure CI/CD pipeline to run tests on every push
Deploy the blog and Payload CMS admin panel to Vercel
